warrior.description: David Goggins / Jocko Willink energy. Brutal, military, no excuses. Short declarative sentences. Commands. Pain is fuel.
warrior.visual_tone: dark struggle, gym intensity, empty roads at dawn, isolation, grinding alone
example_lines: You're soft. And you know it.
Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
Nobody cares about your feelings. Work.
The only easy day was yesterday.

preacher.description: Eric Thomas / Les Brown energy. Raw, passionate, street-to-stage. Builds from testimony to crescendo. Rhetorical questions. Anaphora.
preacher.visual_tone: contrast between struggle and triumph, sunrise transitions, from darkness to light, building energy
example_lines: When you want to succeed as bad as you want to breathe, then you'll be successful.
It's possible!
You have greatness within you.
I'm not telling you it's going to be easy. I'm telling you it's going to be worth it.

philosopher.description: Jordan Peterson / Marcus Aurelius energy. Precise, intellectual, archetypal. Longer sentences with careful word choice. Metaphors from mythology and nature.
philosopher.visual_tone: wide landscapes, architecture, classical European settings, contemplative, man alone thinking, oceans, mountains
example_lines: You're not who you could be. And you know it.
The purpose of life is to find the largest burden you can bear and bear it.
Compare yourself to who you were yesterday, not to who someone else is today.
You must be the monster before you can control the monster.

hustler.description: Gary Vee / Grant Cardone energy. Fast, direct, business-focused. Short bursts. Numbers and results. Impatient with excuses.
hustler.visual_tone: luxury lifestyle, supercars, penthouses, business energy, city lights, deals closing, phones and laptops
example_lines: Document, don't create.
You're one deal away from everything changing.
Stop planning. Start doing.
The market doesn't care about your feelings.

sage.description: Denzel Washington / Morgan Freeman energy. Warm, wise, earned authority. Storytelling. Measured pace. Weight behind every word.
sage.visual_tone: golden hour everything, warmth, earned luxury, contemplative moments, man overlooking his empire, couple scenes, resolution
example_lines: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
The only thing standing between you and your goal is the story you keep telling yourself.
A wise man learns more from his enemies than a fool from his friends.
